PROJECTS
Automated Room Allocation | C++
- Developed an Automated Room Allocation System in C++ using STL and file handling.
- Applied algorithm logic to allocate rooms efficiently while maintaing data consistency.
- Improved accuracy and reduces human error in room assignment process.
Inventory Management System | C++
- Developed a console-based Inventory Management System using C++, STL and file handling to manage product 
   records efficiently.
- Implement features for adding, updating, deleting and searching products with persistent data storage.
- Designed modular code using OOPs principles to ensure scalability and maintainability.
- Reduced manual Inventory tracking errors by automating stock management operations. 
COMPETITION/CONFERENCE
- Practiced competitive programming on Codeforces to achieve a peak rating of 1214 ( pupil ) under the 
   handle Priyanshu_210.
- Achieved a peak rating of 1516 ( 2 star ) under the handle priyanshu_0210
SKILLS AND EXPERTISE
- Language - Proficient : C, C++, Python. | Familiar : SQL, Java.
- Packages &Tools : C++ STL, Git, Numpy, Pandas, Scikit - Learn, Matplotlib, VS code.
- Skills : Data Structure and Algorithm, Object Oriented Programming.
COURSEWORK INFORMATION
- Programming and Data Structure                                     - Probability and Statistics
- Programming and Data Structure ( Lab )                              - Advanced Calculus
- Linear Algebra, Numerical Analysis.                                      - Applied Computational Methods
